what_it_does: This file is a software license that grants MIT permissions for the recollection project and states the associated conditions, warranty disclaimer, and liability limitation.
observations: Grants rights to use, copy, modify, merge, publish, distribute, sublicense, and sell the software
Requires the copyright notice and permission notice to be included in copies or substantial portions
Provides an AS-IS disclaimer and excludes liability for claims or damages
conventions: Follows the widely used MIT License template
Copyright notice appears before the permission grant
Disclaimer and liability limitation are presented in all caps
notes: This is a conventional MIT license file for the recollection project, setting permissive use terms and attribution requirements.
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose as a permissive software license matches the content exactly.
intention_signals: To legally permit broad reuse, modification, and distribution of the recollection software while protecting the author from liability and preserving attribution.
contribution: Supplies the legal terms under which the recollection project may be used, modified, distributed, and sublicensed, and the attribution and disclaimer obligations that must accompany it.
summary_for_embedding: The recollection/LICENSE file is a standard MIT License dated 2025 by Jesse Vincent that grants broad software usage rights and requires preservation of the copyright notice and disclaimer.
intention_for_embedding: To define the permissive licensing terms and liability disclaimer for the recollection project.
